data.status: aiming for an Aug. 1 opening
data.short_description: Daily Press Cafe is a new newsroom-themed cafe concept coming to 22001 Michigan Avenue in downtown West Dearborn, replacing the former Kung Fu Tea bubble tea spot. The cafe will serve coffees, teas, smoothies, and deli sandwiches, with a full menu to be released closer to opening.

data.status: expected to open this summer
data.short_description: Blank Street, a New York-based coffee and matcha chain, is set to open at 1801 Spruce St. in the former Starbucks space in Philadelphia, its second location in the city. Both the Spruce St. location and a previously announced University of Pennsylvania campus location are expected to open this summer.

data.status: getting ready to pour its first beers for the Coatesville community this spring
data.short_description: Steel City Brewing, owned by restaurateur Philip Ferro in partnership with Mark Milanese, is preparing to open at 132 E. Lincoln Hwy. in Coatesville this spring, following construction that began in 2023. The two-level space features a 100-foot bar, polished concrete floors, and a basement event area with brewery equipment, dart boards, and pool tables.

data.location: 250 Lehigh Valley Mall, Whitehall Township, PA 18052
data.status: expected to debut in spring 2027
data.short_description: Texas de Brazil, a Brazilian churrasco steakhouse, is planning to open on the first floor of the Lehigh Valley Mall in Whitehall Township, marking only the second Pennsylvania location and first in Southeastern Pennsylvania. An official opening date has not been announced, but the mall's marketing director told LehighValleyLive.com the steakhouse is expected to debut in spring 2027.

data.status: hoping to debut the new location by this October
data.short_description: Thai restaurant Langbaan is moving to the former Bar Casa Vale space at 215 SE 9th Avenue in Southeast Portland, with owner Earl Ninsom hoping to debut the new location by October. The restaurant is known for seasonal Thai dishes with wine pairings and was previously located in Northwest Portland's Nob Hill neighborhood.

data.event_date: Weekend of article publication (Saturday, May 9 or 10, 2026)
data.status: officially open on Saturday
data.short_description: Solei Beach Club is opening at the recently renovated Kimpton Surfcomber Hotel at 1717 Collins Ave in Miami Beach, offering a Mediterranean-inspired dining, cocktail, and social event space overlooking the ocean. The 11,500-square-foot venue seats up to 75 guests and features luxury cabanas, lounge seating, and oceanfront access.

data.status: closing on June 1
data.short_description: Bratz Y'all Bistro, a German-style bistro, bakery, and biergarten in New Orleans' Bywater neighborhood, will serve its final meal on June 1, 2026, ending a nine-year run. Owner Sven Vorkauf cited rising rent, loss of event space, rising costs, and a difficult landlord situation as the reasons for closure.

data.status: currently targeting a late summer opening
data.short_description: Drive-thru beverage concept 7 Brew is under construction at 2102 North Jackson Street in Tullahoma, Tennessee, targeting a late summer 2026 opening. The location adds to the company's growing Tennessee footprint, which recently expanded into Manchester and Shelbyville.

data.status: hoping to open the concept at the beginning of June
data.short_description: Wasai BBQ, an all-you-can-eat Korean barbecue concept owned by chef Dafu Wei, is coming to the second floor of 2237 S Wentworth Avenue in Chinatown, in the former Won Kow restaurant space. The menu will feature raw meats including chicken, pork, beef, and bulgogi, with pickles as a key accompaniment, plus beer and Korean saki.

data.status: are going to improve a lot of the food quality, service and ambiance; new bar menu set to launch June 1
data.short_description: Victory Bar & Grill at 795 S. Route 73 in West Berlin has come under new family ownership with Amar and Sunitha Gunda, who plan to refresh the menu, upgrade TVs, add fire pits and picnic tables, and introduce live music while retaining the existing name and vibe. The new bar menu is set to launch June 1, with a 30, 60, and 90-day improvement plan underway.

data.status: closing its doors at 11 p.m. on Saturday, May 9, 2026
data.short_description: Anthony's Restaurant and Pub, located in the Louis Joliet Mall, closed after 12 years in business on May 9, 2026. According to a report by Patch, the sudden closure followed a fatal shooting incident in the overflow parking lot of the restaurant.

data.location: 3 W. Gay St., West Chester, PA 19380
data.event_date: Not specified (likely still months away from article date)
data.status: likely still months away
data.short_description: MaGerk's Pub & Grill is set to open at 3 W. Gay St. in the former Iron Hill Brewery space in West Chester, with no official opening date announced. The Maryland-based pub is known for elevated bar fare, Philly cheesesteaks, local craft beers, and signature orange crushes.

data.location: Caroline Street, Edgewood (Atlanta area), GA, Address not specified
data.status: expected to open in late summer
data.short_description: Crumbl is expanding to Edgewood in a 1,403-square-foot space on Caroline Street, operated by KTP Capital as their second Crumbl store. The location will offer Crumbl's rotating cookie lineup, desserts, and popular dirty sodas, and is expected to open in late summer.

data.location: Alpharetta City Center, Alpharetta, GA, Address not specified
data.status: An opening is planned for this summer
data.short_description: Giulia Italian Bakery is opening its fourth location at Alpharetta City Center in a community-driven atmosphere. The menu highlights include croissants, bombolones, baguettes, sandwiches, Italian wine, and coffee.

data.location: Lenox Square (former Lobster Roll space, across from Sweetgreen), Buckhead, Atlanta, GA, Address not specified
data.status: expected to open in October
data.short_description: VIỆTVANA is opening a new flagship store at Lenox Square in Buckhead, its newest Atlanta location, in the former Lobster Roll space across from Sweetgreen. The opening is expected in October.

data.status: will officially open in Downtown Las Vegas on May 15, 2026
data.short_description: NADC Burger is opening its first permanent Las Vegas location at 124 S 6th St in Downtown Las Vegas on May 15, 2026, following a successful three-month pop-up at Resorts World Las Vegas. The skate-inspired restaurant will feature Wagyu cheeseburgers, beef tallow fries, a full bar, and local artwork, with pro skateboarder co-founder Neen Williams expected to attend the grand opening.

data.status: under construction and slated to open this fall
data.short_description: Phin de Louisiane, a Vietnamese-influenced cafe specializing in traditional phin coffee and Asian-inspired drinks, is under construction in Youngsville in Lafayette Parish and slated to open this fall. The concept grew out of a pop-up called Katie's Brewhouse and will offer drinks including Vietnamese iced coffee, Saigon Ube Latte, matcha, and Thai-style iced tea.

data.location: 3377 Las Vegas Blvd S #2170, Las Vegas, NV 89109
data.status: opened at Grand Canal Shoppes at The Venetian Resort Las Vegas on May 7, 2026
data.short_description: RedHead Burger, a Miami-based smash burger brand, opened its first Las Vegas and first West Coast location at Grand Canal Shoppes at The Venetian Resort on May 7, 2026. The 50-seat space is open daily from 11 a.m. to 2 a.m. and features red-and-white interiors with indoor and patio seating.

data.location: Chesapeake Overlook development, Perryville, MD, Address not specified
data.status: aiming to be customer-ready by late November or early December
data.short_description: Zaxby's, operated by the Stradford Empowerment Group, has broken ground on a new Perryville, Maryland location at the Chesapeake Overlook development, marking the chain's Cecil County debut. The newly constructed restaurant will seat up to 30 diners and feature a dual drive-thru, targeting a late November or early December opening.

data.status: An opening timeline is not presently available
data.short_description: Wonder food hall is planning to open at 20936 Frederick Road in Germantown, MD, taking over the former Jos. A. Bank storefront. No opening timeline has been provided for this location.

data.event_date: By end of 2026 (construction projected to wrap November 30, 2026)
data.status: work set to start this summer; construction projected to wrap by November 30
data.short_description: Qdoba has filed paperwork with the Texas Department of Licensing and Regulation for a new Terminal A location at 2625 North International Parkway at DFW Airport, with construction projected to start by June 22 and wrap by November 30, 2026. The 3,200-square-foot space will require new electrical, mechanical, plumbing systems, and interior finishes.

data.location: I-40 and I-55 split, West Memphis, AR, Address not specified
data.status: West Memphis locals will be able to enjoy Buc-ee's for themselves when it opens in June of 2028
data.short_description: Buc-ee's is planning a 74,000-square-foot travel center on a 34-acre lot at the I-40 and I-55 split in West Memphis, set to open in June 2028. The city is currently completing a $30 million infrastructure project — roads, roundabouts, and utility updates — in preparation for the arrival, with 75% of that work complete.

data.status: Small restaurant opening in an existing restaurant space
data.short_description: A Memphis area food truck is opening A Forkful Restaurant and Catering at 2650 Thousand Oaks Boulevard. It will occupy a dedicated 1,622 square feet in an existing restaurant space. A certificate of occupancy is currently under review with the Memphis and Shelby County Division of Planning and Development.

data.status: preparing to mount a Jonesboro comeback
data.short_description: McAlister’s Deli is preparing to return to Jonesboro with a new location at 2024 Fair Park Boulevard after the closure of its South Caraway Road location. Developer Prateek Gera has a contract pending for the land sale with the deal expected to close in three months. Owner David Kearbey already operates three McAlister’s storefronts.

data.status: reopening day will be June 1, 2026
data.short_description: Gina’s Place will reopen in its new home at the former McAlister’s Deli building at 2400 S Caraway Road on June 1, 2026. The restaurant closed abruptly in December of last year. Owner Regina McKay is hiring additional staff with interviews planned for the third week of May.

data.location: 1563 S Commerce St, Las Vegas, NV 89102
data.status: set to debut this spring
data.short_description: Bartho’s is a new all-bottle German-influenced beer bar set to open in the Downtown Las Vegas Arts District at 1563 S Commerce St. It will feature over 70 global brews with board game nights and art-focused community events. Construction is coming to a close and permits are being finalized.

data.status: slated to open
data.short_description: No Diggity is a new cafe concept expected to open in Houston's East End Revitalized area at 2307 Bell Street. Construction is already underway on the 1,481 square foot cafe with a $250,000 interior renovation slated to wrap up by June. The cafe should open before the end of summer.

data.location: 1201 S Main St, Las Vegas, NV 89104
data.status: set to hit the Valley this year
data.short_description: Cobra Clutch Cocktail Bar is a new swanky concept set to open in the Downtown Las Vegas Arts District at 1201 S Main St on Brewery Row. The Instagram page details a Spring 2026 opening and the brand recently held a hiring fair. TFC Group LLC is the business entity behind the opening.

data.status: gearing up to open
data.short_description: Bosphorus Turkish Cuisine is preparing to open at 6835 Five Star Blvd in Rocklin with traditional Turkish fare including hot and cold mezes, kebabs, entrées, and homemade desserts. No official opening date has been announced but the restaurant is building anticipation on social media. The eatery is being opened by Didem Dinkay.

data.status: slated to open
data.short_description: Wingstop is set to open a new location in the Highlands Shopping Center at 300 North Main Street taking over two suites. Construction is already underway and slated to be completed in June. Franchisees Bebe and David Mora expect the new location to open before the end of summer.

data.store_name: Lobster King Seafood and Wings (with A1 Wings & Things)
data.status: coming soon
data.short_description: Lobster King Seafood is teaming up with A1 Wings & Things to open a new location at 420 S Germantown Pkwy #108 in Cordova. The team is bringing Cajun seafood into the kitchen. The new location has a sign permit and certificate of occupancy application under review.

data.location: 7000 Las Vegas Blvd N, Las Vegas, NV 89115
data.status: set to make its return
data.short_description: Salvage City Supper Club is set to return to EDC Las Vegas at the Las Vegas Motor Speedway for the festival May 15-17. It is a 60-minute immersive dining experience with multi-course family-style tasting menu by Chef Matt Rolnick paired with wine and cocktails. This is the 6th evolution of the experience.

data.location: 1405 S Cherry Ln, Fort Worth, TX 76108
data.status: set to open early next year
data.short_description: Major Perk Coffee is opening a new location in Fort Worth at 1405 S Cherry Lane early next year. The cafe was specifically requested by the White Settlement Chief of Police and will have a larger footprint than the Weatherford location with dine-in and drive-thru options. It honors uniformed military personnel and first responders.

data.status: opening
data.short_description: Lil Pig Lil Pig from the team behind Thirsty Sasquatch is opening at 2014 Main St in Vancouver. The pork-focused concept will feature traditional smokers, rotisserie cooking, live fire, in-house bakers, and occasional 4-5 course prix-fixe dinners. It will function as both a bodega for take-home items and a supper club.

data.status: would open
data.short_description: The owner of Da’Hui Hawaiian Bar & Grill is planning a new venue called the Tonga Room that would open at 8000 SE Foster Road. Liquor licensing paperwork has been submitted for entertainment including video lottery machines, live music, and dancing. It is still too early to share much more about the project.

data.status: setting up shop
data.short_description: SOKO Butcher is setting up shop in Crystal City at 269 19th Court S., Suite 95 in the Grace and Reva apartment building. The 1,600 square foot space will function as a butcher shop, sandwich shop, deli, and retail shop selling beer and wine with seating. It will feature the restaurant’s take on the Philly cheesesteak.

data.location: 1113 SE Rasmussen Blvd, Battle Ground, WA 98604
data.status: has closed
data.short_description: Emanar Cellars, the winery located at 1113 SE Rasmussen Blvd in Battle Ground, has closed.

data.location: 1113 SE Rasmussen Blvd, Battle Ground, WA 98604
data.event_date: toward the end of this month
data.status: will celebrate its grand opening toward the end of this month
data.short_description: The Savvy Sipper is a new cocktail bar replacing Emanar Cellars at 1113 SE Rasmussen Blvd in Battle Ground. It promises Classic Cocktails, Gourmet Grazing, and Vintage Vibes. The grand opening is scheduled toward the end of this month.

data.location: W Evergreen Blvd & Daniels St, Vancouver, WA 98660
data.status: coming November 2026
data.short_description: Couve Carts is a new food truck pod expected to occupy several lots at the intersection of W Evergreen Boulevard and Daniels Street in Vancouver. It will include fire pits, play areas for dogs and kids, and a tap room. The project is moving forward after initial posts seeking the best food trucks.

data.status: embarking on opening its second location
data.short_description: Koyo Hand Roll Bar is opening its second Houston location at 1835 N Shepherd Drive, Suite B2 in The Heights. Construction is already underway on the 1,218 square foot remodel and is slated to wrap up this July for a summer opening. The contemporary sushi concept specializes in made-to-order handrolls.

data.status: will be opening there
data.short_description: Billy Ray’s will be opening in the former Black Water space at 835 NE Broadway in Portland. The project is backed by Paula and Mark Hylland, owners of The Mule Bar and Mousetrap Tavern. More details are pending as it is still early.

data.status: work will begin on the project soon
data.short_description: Nevermore Tavern is an upcoming Poe-themed bar planned for 170 W Main Street, Suite 101 in Lewisville. The 3,500 square foot remodeled space will feature literary events, book club meetings, live music, and a lending library. Construction is estimated to begin July 1 and wrap by October 1.

data.location: 5781 W Sahara Ave, Las Vegas, NV 89146
data.status: should open in the next few months
data.short_description: JP’s Brasserie & Sports Den is a new restaurant and sports bar expected to open at 5781 W Sahara Ave, Suite 100 in a West Las Vegas shopping center. Owner Gina Paul expects the new bar to open in the next few months for a summer opening. It is associated with Liam’s Hospitality LLC.

data.location: 2281 Del Paso Rd, Suite 150, Sacramento, CA 95835
data.status: set to open in the Parks Place shopping center
data.short_description: City records indicate Peet's Coffee is planning a new ~2,900 sq ft café at 2281 Del Paso Rd, Suite 150 in the Parks Place shopping center in North Natomas, Sacramento. What Now has reached out to Peet's for confirmation and additional details.

data.location: 2791 E Bidwell St, Suite 100, Folsom, CA 95630
data.status: officially listed as closed
data.short_description: Red Hot Chilli Pepper, an Indian-Chinese fusion restaurant at 2791 E Bidwell St in Folsom's Broadstone Plaza, ceased operations in early 2026 and was listed for sale as a turnkey restaurant. Rahi Hospitality Group has since filed for an alcohol license for a forthcoming replacement concept at the same address.

data.location: 2791 E Bidwell St, Suite 100, Folsom, CA 95630
data.event_date: A few months from article date
data.status: a "few months away" from opening
data.short_description: Rahi Hospitality Group, led by CEO Gagan Bahad, has filed for an alcohol license for a forthcoming restaurant concept at 2791 E Bidwell St, Suite 100 in Folsom's Broadstone Plaza, in the former Red Hot Chilli Pepper space. The name, concept, and menu have not yet been revealed; more details will be shared closer to launch.

data.location: 701 Vista Trelago, Trelago Market, Maitland, FL, Address not specified (no zip)
data.status: calls for a "Summer 2026" opening
data.short_description: Naya Comida + Barrita, a contemporary Mexican wood-fire concept owned by Juan Rios, is opening in Trelago Market in Maitland at 701 Vista Trelago. The menu will center on wood fire, nixtamal, and mezcal, inspired by the Pacific coast of Riviera Nayarit, with handcrafted tortillas and mezcal and tequila-centric cocktails.

data.status: the first two will be launching this summer
data.short_description: Stoner's Pizza Joint is opening its first two Orlando-area locations this summer, with one at 4781 South Orange Avenue in Orlando Sodo and another in Ocoee. The fast-growing quick-service pizza chain has committed eight total units in the Orlando market.

data.location: 207 N Clarke Rd, Suite 3, Ocoee, FL 34761
data.status: the first two will be launching this summer
data.short_description: Stoner's Pizza Joint is opening its first two Orlando-area locations this summer, with one in Ocoee at 207 N Clarke Rd, Suite 3 and another in Orlando Sodo. The chain has committed eight total units in the Orlando market.

data.location: 7612 University Blvd, Unit 21, Winter Park, FL 32792
data.status: "We are coming very soon"
data.short_description: Viva Healthy, a health-focused cafe brand created by chef Maria Gabriela Toro, is opening at 7612 University Blvd, Unit 21 in Winter Park's Unigold Shopping Center. An April 29 Instagram post confirmed the location is nearly ready, though no official opening date has been announced.

data.location: 4060 Thomas St, Unit B01, Oxford, FL 34484
data.status: no opening date yet; still working on the buildout
data.short_description: Salbio Coffee & Bites is a new sister cafe concept opening next door to Candelaria Eatery & Cafe at 4060 Thomas St, Unit B01 in Oxford, FL. Owner Javier said no opening date has been set yet as the buildout is still underway.

data.status: aiming to welcome guests in late June 2026
data.short_description: On the Bun, a retro-style smash burger concept from owners Hector Rodriguez and Mila Hernandez, is opening at 120 Merrimack St in Downtown Lowell, targeting a late June 2026 debut. The menu will feature smash burgers, hand-cut fries, milkshakes, and local draft beer, with vegetarian options in development.

data.status: will launch this summer
data.short_description: A new unnamed Japanese restaurant run in partnership with The Indigo Road Hospitality Group is opening on the ground floor of the Vandeveer residential building at 515 N Pearl St in Downtown Jacksonville this summer. The menu is expected to highlight local ingredients, fresh seafood, wood-fired robata grill offerings, sushi, and sashimi.

data.event_date: Soft open summer 2026; grand opening September 2026
data.status: expected to soft-open this summer, with plans for a grand opening in September
data.short_description: The June, a private members club opening at 424 N Hogan St in the historic former Federal Reserve Building in Downtown Jacksonville, is expected to soft-open this summer with a grand opening planned for September. The club is described as a city-centric, modern members club focused on community, cultural programming, and elevated hospitality.

data.status: permanently closing
data.short_description: The Peasant's Courtyard at 3195 Danville Blvd in Alamo served its final meals on April 17, 2026, permanently closing after the space was taken over by chef Rodney Worth's East Bay Artisan bakery group (Worth Group). The new concept, The Courtyard Restaurant, is being built out in the same space ahead of its 2026 reopening.

data.status: remodelling the space in anticipation of its reopening in 2026
data.short_description: The Courtyard Restaurant, led by chef Rodney Worth of East Bay Artisan bakery group (Worth Group), is taking over and remodeling the former Peasant's Courtyard space at 3195 Danville Blvd in Alamo. The new concept will feature a seasonal lunch and brunch menu, with dinner service planned to follow.

data.status: preparing for its DMV arrival
data.short_description: 55 Seventy, an exclusive Dallas-based private members club, has a liquor license application under review for its upcoming Georgetown location at 1115 30th St NW in Washington, DC. The club will have seating for up to 250 and total occupancy of 675, offering wine, fine dining, and live entertainment.

data.location: 349 Old Newport Blvd, Newport Beach, CA 92663
data.status: official opening timeline has not yet been disclosed
data.short_description: Ugah's Bakery, an Israeli-inspired homemade pastry concept from pastry chef Tal Rubin Hovav, may open at 349 Old Newport Blvd in Newport Beach, based on a plan review from the Orange County Health Care Agency. The menu is expected to feature items such as Hanukkah Sufganiyot, Maamoul, palmiers, and croissants, though no official opening timeline has been disclosed.

data.location: 3915 N Lockwood Ridge Rd, Sarasota, FL 34234
data.status: the opening is expected next month
data.short_description: Venezuelan restaurant 100% Maracaibo is expanding to a third location at 3915 N Lockwood Ridge Road in Sarasota, with an opening expected next month (June 2026) per owner Josue. The restaurant is known for empanadas, Mandocas, Tequeños, breakfast dishes, and other Venezuelan fare.

data.location: 10134 W Happy Valley Rd, Peoria, AZ 85383
data.status: official opening timeline has not yet been announced
data.short_description: PRESS Coffee appears to be preparing its first West Valley location at 10134 W Happy Valley Rd in Lake Pleasant Towne Center in Peoria, near the Sprouts Farmers Market at Four Corners. No official opening timeline has been announced; What Now Phoenix has reached out to PRESS Coffee for comment.

data.location: 400 S Charleston Ave, Fort Meade, FL 33841
data.status: plan review paperwork submitted
data.short_description: Plan review paperwork has been filed by Lolitas Kitchen LLC for a restaurant at 400 S Charleston Avenue in Fort Meade, on the southwest corner of South Charleston Avenue and Fourth Street Southwest. The owner was not immediately available for comment, leaving food offerings and projected opening timeline unknown.

data.status: on track to debut in the fall of 2026
data.short_description: Daily Provisions is preparing to open a new location at 501 Boylston St in Boston's Back Bay, marking the brand's third Greater Boston location. A representative confirmed the Back Bay location is on track to debut in fall 2026, with more details expected in coming months.

data.status: aiming to welcome guests before the end of June 2026
data.short_description: Dairy Queen is preparing to open at 414 Broadway in Lynn, MA, returning to the North Shore after more than three decades away. The location is currently hiring and undergoing construction, with the team aiming to welcome guests before the end of June 2026.

data.location: 200 N Galvez St, New Orleans, LA 70112
data.status: under construction
data.short_description: Structural renovations have been approved for an unnamed cafe at 200 N Galvez St at the corner of Iberville in New Orleans' Treme-Lafitte area. Building owner Roscoe Wells confirmed plans for a cafe concept with a new kitchen, roof, and ADA bathroom, appearing to be primarily a takeout operation with a walk-up service window.

data.location: 8400 NW 53rd Street, Suite F107, Doral, FL, Address not specified (no zip)
data.status: No official opening date has been announced
data.short_description: Cowy Burger, the smash burger brand named "Very Best Burger" at the 2024 South Beach Wine & Food Festival's Burger Bash, has filed permit applications to open a new location at 8400 NW 53rd Street, Suite F107 in Doral. No official opening date has been announced.

data.status: when it opens this fall
data.short_description: Cocktail Test Kitchen, a 400-square-foot micro-bar concept co-owned by beverage industry veterans Brad Nugent and Patrick Wert, is opening at 359 W 54th St in Hell's Kitchen this fall. The venue will function as a neighborhood cocktail bar, an R&D lab, and a content studio for the owners' consulting firm.

Article link does not include individual sub-URLs for each concept.
